title: Better Grass
description:
This is a texture pack that makes the textures of the Grass Block, Snowy Grass Block, Path Block, Podzol Block, and the Mycelium Block look better.

It makes the blocks have the top texture for the side textures and makes mountains and hills look better.
body:
This is a texture pack that makes the textures of the **_Grass Block, Snowy Grass Block, Path Block, Podzol Block, and the Mycelium Block_** look better.

It **_makes the blocks have the top texture for the side textures_** and makes mountains and hills look better.
